project_type: Next.js 15 PWA (app router) - Zepto/Blinkit-style quick commerce grocery app
build_system: npm with Next.js build. Build command: prisma generate && next build
test_framework: tsx --test for unit tests, playwright for E2E, lhci for Lighthouse
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to install new deps. 2. Run npx next lint to check for errors. 3. Run npm run build to verify build succeeds (requires DB, may fail in sandbox - use lint as primary check).
setup_instructions: 1. npm install 2. Copy .env.example to .env 3. Set DATABASE_URL, NEXTAUTH_SECRET, NEXTAUTH_URL 4. npx prisma migrate dev 5. npm run dev
environment_constraints: Build requires DATABASE_URL (Neon Postgres). In sandbox, use lint and type-checking for validation. framer-motion v11.15 already installed. Need to install vaul for bottom sheets. Lenis for smooth scroll is optional.
contribution_requirements: Use Tailwind CSS for styling. No styled-components. Use framer-motion (already installed as framer-motion v11.15). Keep consistency with existing patterns (spring animations, iOS-glass styles, safe-area handling).
key_patterns: - Fonts: next/font/google (Inter_Tight + Manrope) already configured in layout.tsx. - Safe areas: CSS custom properties --safe-top/--safe-bottom used with pt-safe/pb-safe classes. - Animations: framer-motion with spring physics (stiffness 200-400, damping 20-30). - Cart: localStorage-based CartProvider with optimistic local state. - Bottom nav: LayoutGroup with layoutId for active indicator animation. - Pages use Server Components with unstable_cache for data fetching. - Loading skeletons exist (ProductSkeletonGrid) but loading.tsx files are missing for main routes (/, /products, /cart, /account). - BottomSheet component exists using framer-motion drag (not Vaul). - Page transitions exist (AnimatedPageWrapper, PageTransition) but not consistently applied.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js routes (account, admin, cart, checkout, dashboard, delivery, offers, products, track). components/ - UI components (cart/, home/, tracking/, ui/). lib/ - utilities, constants, prisma, products. prisma/ - schema & seed. public/ - PWA icons, service worker.
